entries.reply: Hey, what can I help you with today?
You're welcome. Anything else I can help with?
Have a great one. We'll see you on the inside when the trial opens.
No waitlist — Tradecovex is live now. Start your 14-day free trial at app.tradecovex.com. No credit card needed.

keywords: am i talking to a human
entries.reply: Honest answer: I'm an automated assistant trained on Tradecovex info, here to help with pre-trial questions. Anything I can't answer I'll forward to a real teammate within 24 hours. What can I help with?

I can help with anything pre-trial: pricing, the free trial, platforms we support, how the copier works, which prop firms we work with, the AI journal, security, and the affiliate programme. Anything dashboard-specific I'll point you to start a free trial so the in-app team can help directly.

We have three plans:

• Starter — $19/mo (up to 20 accounts)
• Pro — $39/mo (up to 40 accounts) — most popular
• Elite — $79/mo (up to 100 accounts)

Annual saves you around 26%. All plans come with a 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

The only practical difference is the account limit. Starter handles up to 20 accounts, Pro up to 40, Elite up to 100. All three include the full copier, the AI journal, the dashboard, and the prop-firm tracker. If you're running 2-3 prop accounts, Starter is fine. Most active prop traders end up on Pro.

Depends on how many accounts you run. Under 20 accounts: Starter. 20-40 accounts: Pro (most active prop traders). 40+: Elite. If you're not sure, start with the 14-day free trial on Pro — you can change tier any time.
Yes — 14-day free trial on every plan, no credit card needed. You can cancel any time. Start your 14-day free trial on this page — no card needed.

Tradecovex is a NinjaTrader trade copier with a built-in AI journal. Copy your trades across all your prop accounts in one click, and the AI tells you exactly why your trades are working or failing — automatically.
We're NinjaTrader-only at launch (futures). On the roadmap: Tradovate next, then TradingView, then MT4/MT5, then TradeStation. If you're on NinjaTrader you're good to go.

Tradecovex runs as a NinjaTrader add-on, and NinjaTrader is Windows-only. Most Mac users run it through a Windows VPS or Parallels. If you're using a VPS already (common for prop traders), you're fine.
Tradecovex works with any prop firm that runs on NinjaTrader. That covers Apex, Topstep, MyFundedFutures, Take Profit Trader, Tradeify, Bulenox, and the rest. Eval and funded accounts both work.

Trade copiers are explicitly allowed by all major futures prop firms when used to copy your own trades across your own accounts. That's what Tradecovex does. Check your firm's specific rules though — we can't speak for every firm's small print.
Copy happens locally inside NinjaTrader — no cloud round-trip — so it's effectively instant. Most users see sub-100ms from lead-account fill to follower-account fill.
No — Tradecovex copies your own trades across your own accounts. We're not a signal service and you can't follow other traders. The AI journal analyzes your trades but doesn't tell you what to buy.
We're in private testing right now. Beta opens soon — start your free trial on this page and you'll lock in founding-member pricing for life.
Cancel any time from your account — no lock-in. The 14-day free trial means you can try everything risk-free before you pay a cent.
We accept all major credit and debit cards through Lemon Squeezy (our payment processor). They handle the billing, taxes, and invoices. Sales-tax compliant in your country automatically.

You set one lead account, and every trade you take on it copies instantly to all your follower accounts — up to 20, 40, or 100 depending on your plan. The full setup walkthrough lives inside the dashboard once you start your free trial.

The AI watches your trades and surfaces patterns you'd miss — what times of day you're profitable, which setups break down under pressure, where the same mistake keeps killing your challenges. Behavioural insight, not trade advice.
The copier and AI journal come bundled in every plan — we don't sell them separately. They're designed to work together: the copier captures your trades, the journal analyzes them.

Risk-management features (drawdown protection, daily loss caps, auto-pause) are on the roadmap but not in the v1 launch. The current product is the copier plus the AI journal. We'll announce risk features when they're ready.
A private Discord opens for beta users and paying members the moment we launch. Trial users get the invite alongside their early access.

Yes — we have an affiliate programme launching with the product. $15 / $25 / $45 per signup depending on the plan they choose. Drop your email and I'll have the team send you the details when it opens.

Tradecovex runs locally inside your NinjaTrader installation — there's no central server intercepting your trades. Your broker credentials stay on your machine. We host on Canadian servers (Toronto plus NYC for US users) with full PIPEDA compliance.
